briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: To merge overlapping and adjacent text annotations (like bold, italic spans) into contiguous annotation regions, resolving contradictions by type.

detaileddescription.para: Critical for producing clean annotation output from fragmented reader results. \par \b Scope\/ \: Annotation grouping, merging overlapping annotations, filtering contradicting annotations, delete previous merged cleanup. \par \b Input\/ \: List of Annotation objects, source text string. \par \b Output\/ \: Merged and filtered list of Annotation objects. \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(6): re, collections.defaultdict] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: merge_annotations returns an empty list for empty input.
Annotations with different name/value pairs are never merged into a single annotation.
Non-mergeable annotations are passed through unmodified. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why handle spaces explicitly as Space objects? A: Whitespace between annotations can bridge mergeable spans. Explicit space tracking prevents over-merging across paragraph breaks. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added SEMANTIC TEMPLATE markup and LDD logging] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
CLASS 5[Whitespace interval model] => Space CLASS 7[Grouped annotation container] => ExtendedAnnotation CLASS 9[Core annotation merging logic] => AnnotationMerger \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
